memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer)
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzRobert於1185年4月12日出生在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯時，她的父親Robert FitzRoger18歲，母親Margaret de Chesney26歲。她於1203年11月28日與Sir Piers FitzHerbert在英國艾可可拉維林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年6月1日在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzRobert于1185年4月12日出生在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯时，她的父亲Robert FitzRoger18岁，母亲Margaret de Chesney26岁。她于1203年11月28日与Sir Piers FitzHerbert在英国艾可可拉維林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年6月1日在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzRobert was born on 12 April 1185, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, her father, Robert FitzRoger, was 18 and her mother, Margaret de Chesney, was 26. She married Sir Piers FitzHerbert on 28 November 1203, in Clavering, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 June 1225, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzRobert est née le 12 avril 1185, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoger, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Chesney, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Piers FitzHerbert le 28 novembre 1203, à Clavering, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1225, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzRobert am 12. April 1185 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert FitzRoger 18 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Chesney 26. Sie hat am 28. November 1203 in Clavering, Essex, England Sir Piers FitzHerbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1225 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzRobert è nata il il 12 aprile 1185 nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Robert FitzRoger, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Chesney, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Piers FitzHerbert il 28 novembre 1203, nel Clavering, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1225, nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzRobertが1185年4月12日にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRogerは18歳，母Margaret de Chesneyは26歳であった。1203年11月28日にイギリスエセックスクラバーイングでSir Piers FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年6月1日にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzRobert(이)가 1185년 4월 12일 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert FitzRoger(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Chesney(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1203년 11월 28일 영국 에세스 클레이버링에서 Sir Piers FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 6월 1일 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.12 April 1185–1 June 1225: 12 de abril de 1185–1 de junho de 1225
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzRobert nasceu em 12 de abril de 1185, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoger, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Chesney, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Piers FitzHerbert em 28 de novembro de 1203, em Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1225, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzRobert родилась 12 апреля 1185 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert FitzRoger было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Chesney, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Piers FitzHerbert 28 ноября 1203 г. в местности клавиринг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1225 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.12 April 1185–1 June 1225: 12 de abril de 1185–1 de junio de 1225
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice FitzRobert nació el 12 de abril de 1185, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzRoger, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret de Chesney, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Piers FitzHerbert el 28 de noviembre de 1203, en Clavering, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1225, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
